title: Topic Hub
description: A cross-collection workspace that accumulates memory on a subject over time.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Topic Hub
onboarding.intro: A workspace that builds lasting knowledge on a subject across your collections.

points.title: Pick your collections
points.body: Choose which knowledge collections this hub draws from.

points.title: Ask across everything
points.body: Question the agent and it searches every collection at once, with citations.

points.title: It remembers
points.body: Findings accumulate as memory, so each session builds on the last.

suggestions.label: Summarise
suggestions.prompt: Summarise what we know so far.

suggestions.label: Open questions
suggestions.prompt: What are the biggest open questions on this topic?

suggestions.label: Across collections
suggestions.prompt: What do the collections agree and disagree on?
